nasb.text: And he said to him, ‘Your brother has come, and your father has killed the fattened calf because he has received him back safe and sound.’

esv.text: And he said to him, ‘Your brother has come, and your father has killed the fattened calf, because he has received him back safe and sound.’

cnv.text: 僕人說：‘你弟弟回來了，你父親因為他平安無恙地回來，就宰了肥牛犢。’

ccb.text: “奴仆回答说，‘你弟弟回来了！你父亲因他无灾无难地回来，特地宰了那只肥牛犊。’

csbs.text: 仆人对他说：‘你弟弟回来了。你父亲因他平安无恙地回来，就宰杀了那只养肥的牛犊。’
